title: calibrachoa micrantha
intro: Calibrachoa micrantha, also known as the small-flowered calibrachoa, is a type of flowering plant in the evening primrose family that is native to South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Calibrachoa micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of Calibrachoa micrantha often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
